title: Some things I need clearing up about the show
display_title: Some things I need clearing up about the show
wikitext:
[]: Some things I need clearing up about the show.             Quote Post by mastervampire » Tue Aug 05, 2008 1:32 am Im a huge evangelion fan, its my favourite anime but ive got a few quesitons that i need clearing up so i understand it better. 1. I know that angles and humans arnt supposed to live on the same planet togeather, but what would happend if humans developed space travel and went to a planet dominated by Angels to take a look? 2. Are the FAR who made the seads of life still alive themselves? 3. Before third impact, what happens to a person and their soul when they die? e.g goto "heaven" or back to liltih or something? 4. At the end of EoE is the whole world trashed? How would Shinji and Asuka survive? 5. When Shinji went on the huge mind trip near the end of the movie after he saw the naked Rei/kaworu was he actually still inside eva unit 1? or somewhere else? 6. When he went on that mind trip was he actually speaking to real people who got caught up in the instrumentality? e.g Asuka or miasto? 7. How does seele get a soul from adam or lilith and put in in a human body? i never understood that, its just floating around or they take it from their body or something? 8. Nerv HQ, is that actually inside liliths egg? Thanks a lot :)

[]: Re: Some things i need clearing up about the show             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 05, 2008 2:07 am 1 -- incompatible ecosystems are incompatible. 2 -- insufficient data 3 -- insufficient data 4 -- IMHO, yes , and well... 5 -- It's not clear where his locus of consciousness was. Early scenarios for the movie have him re-embody in the entry plug. 6 -- yes (how else does he find out about Misato's sexathon). 7 -- advanced metabiological techniques as pioneered by Prof. Fuyutsuki and his star student Yui Ikari. 8 -- yes, the GeoFront is a FAR artefact, also known as the Black Moon.

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Tue Aug 05, 2008 2:10 am Good questions! 1. Not sure. They'd kill one another? I don't know if some huge catastrophe will happen if they made contact. 2. I don't think we've been given enough info to know for sure. Answer is probably "probably," since the FAR are pretty much ownage. 3. Where do souls go when someone dies? I don't know if NGE is specific on this since its universe isn't really associated with a certain religion or belief system. 4. http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4354&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=0 like that, maybe? 5. I think he was inside Shogouki until he got tanged and merged with everyone else. 6. I think he was communicating with them, yes, since their minds have merged. 7. Not sure. Adam was reduced to an embryo after the 2nd impact, but I'm not sure what happened to the soul. It might've been 'captured' or ripped from the embryo, or who knows. Fanwank? 8. I think so. The Black Moon. Edit - Mr.Tines you're a quick one!

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Aug 05, 2008 2:12 am I can't guarentee accuracy, as you're asking the big unknowns. 1. The fact that the FAR weren't an interstellar empire implies that it's pretty much impossible, SoL or not. 2. Unknown. 3. Either the soul stays in the body for all time, or they eventually get recycled and become a new individual. Hard to say. 4. The whole world wasn't trashed. They woke up in a city that had been trashed by two N2 mines (at least), Ramiel, Israfel's explosion, Sahaquiel's explosion, and Armisael's explosion. The rest of the world would have looked quite normal. Also, we saw trees post-3I, implying that the ecosystem bounced back. 5. Dunno. 6. I think so, but I don't understand 3I. 7. They never did. Adam & Lilith came implanted with souls that they released. If they'd still had souls in them, they would have been in their Rooms of Guf (the vagina-like organs on their palms). 8. Basically, I think. Hopefully Reichu will rescue us here.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 05, 2008 2:15 am Legendary wrote: Also, we saw trees post-3I

[]: Re: Some things i need clearing up about the show             Quote Post by swamp147 » Tue Aug 05, 2008 2:17 am Mr. Tines wrote: well...

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Tue Aug 05, 2008 2:22 am "Everytime someone mentions 3rd Impact, Mr.Tines will post 'his' picture."

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Aug 05, 2008 2:54 am Mr. Tines wrote: Legendary wrote: Also, we saw trees post-3I

[]: Re: Some things i need clearing up about the show             Quote Post by V » Tue Aug 05, 2008 10:29 am mastervampire wrote: Im a huge evangelion fan, its my favourite anime but ive got a few quesitons that i need clearing up so i understand it better. 1. I know that angles and humans arnt supposed to live on the same planet togeather, but what would happend if humans developed space travel and went to a planet dominated by Angels to take a look?

[]: Re: Some things i need clearing up about the show             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Aug 05, 2008 3:02 pm Mr. Tines wrote: There's something happening in the background.

[]: Re: Some things i need clearing up about the show             Quote Post by chee » Tue Aug 05, 2008 4:05 pm mastervampire wrote: Im a huge evangelion fan, its my favourite anime but ive got a few quesitons that i need clearing up so i understand it better. 1. I know that angles and humans arnt supposed to live on the same planet togeather, but what would happend if humans developed space travel and went to a planet dominated by Angels to take a look? 2. Are the FAR who made the seads of life still alive themselves? 3. Before third impact, what happens to a person and their soul when they die? e.g goto "heaven" or back to liltih or something? 4. At the end of EoE is the whole world trashed? How would Shinji and Asuka survive? 5. When Shinji went on the huge mind trip near the end of the movie after he saw the naked Rei/kaworu was he actually still inside eva unit 1? or somewhere else? 6. When he went on that mind trip was he actually speaking to real people who got caught up in the instrumentality? e.g Asuka or miasto? 7. How does seele get a soul from adam or lilith and put in in a human body? i never understood that, its just floating around or they take it from their body or something? 8. Nerv HQ, is that actually inside liliths egg? Thanks a lot :)

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Tue Aug 05, 2008 4:43 pm Mr. Tines wrote: There's something happening in the background.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Aug 05, 2008 4:58 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Legendary wrote: Also, we saw trees post-3I

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Aug 05, 2008 6:45 pm As far as the "Picture of epic doom" goes... I expect that most of the world is more or less salvageable depending on the particular mix of people who come back there. Most of Japan, however, is going to be FUBAR. Yes, there are many happy little trees in the pic. You may also take note of the tidal wave (the first of several) that is looming higher than any of the pictured mountains.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Tue Aug 05, 2008 7:04 pm Warning. Warning. This is not a drill! Can I humbly suggest that to save us from yet another locked thread, discussion relating to question 4 be redirected to this thread that Xard posted ? (Before Reichu arrives and rains damnation on us...)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Aug 05, 2008 7:52 pm why of course, Zerogoki: after all, being 10 months since any new Evangelion stuff and 6 months at least before Rebuild 2.0, we're currently facing a massive 4-5 new Evangelion discussion threads a month, and that's far, far too many.

[]: Re: Some things i need clearing up about the show             Quote Post by V » Tue Aug 05, 2008 7:53 pm V wrote: Presumably....that might be one of the reasons why the FAR created the Dead Sea Scrolls:

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Wed Aug 06, 2008 4:03 am I thought most of the stuff in the first post had to do with the games...

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Wed Aug 06, 2008 7:21 am NemZ wrote: I expect that most of the world is more or less salvageable depending on the particular mix of people who come back there. Most of Japan, however, is going to be FUBAR. Yes, there are many happy little trees in the pic. You may also take note of the tidal wave (the first of several) that is looming higher than any of the pictured mountains.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Aug 06, 2008 9:08 am a fanfic thing I always kind of liked with the "anyone can come back" thing is a variation that Misato and Kaji could come back, as 14 year old teenagers like the Eva pilots (which would be kind of fun). However, I really think Kaji died too long before Third Impact to be resurrected.
